# Gravity Room — API surface & DB schema

> Auto-generated reference. The sections between `AUTO:*` sentinels are
> regenerated by `pnpm run context:refresh` (requires `pnpm run dev:api`
> running locally) and reflect the live API + DB.
> This file is NOT auto-loaded into agent context — read it on demand,
> or go straight to the sources: `apps/backend/api/src/routes/` and
> `packages/database/src/schema.ts`.

## Auto-generated: API surface

<!-- AUTO:API-START -->

_52 endpoints across 9 tags. Source: http://localhost:3001/swagger/json._

### Auth

- `GET /api/auth/providers` — List available sign-in providers
- `POST /api/auth/google` — Sign in with Google
- `POST /api/auth/mobile/google` — Sign in with Google for mobile clients
- `POST /api/auth/signup` — Sign up with email and password
- `POST /api/auth/login` — Log in with email and password
- `POST /api/auth/verify-email` — Verify email address
- `POST /api/auth/resend-verification` — Resend the email verification link
- `POST /api/auth/forgot-password` — Request a password reset
- `POST /api/auth/reset-password` — Reset password
- `GET /api/auth/apple/start` — Start Sign in with Apple
- `POST /api/auth/apple/callback` — Apple sign-in callback (form_post)
- `GET /api/auth/github/start` — Start GitHub sign-in
- `GET /api/auth/github/callback` — GitHub sign-in callback
- `GET /api/auth/microsoft/start` — Start Microsoft sign-in
- `GET /api/auth/microsoft/callback` — Microsoft sign-in callback
- `POST /api/auth/dev` — Dev-only test sign-in (404 in production)
- `POST /api/auth/dev/password-user` — Dev-only verified password-user seed (404 in production)
- `POST /api/auth/refresh` — Refresh access token
- `POST /api/auth/mobile/refresh` — Refresh mobile auth tokens
- `POST /api/auth/signout` — Sign out
- `POST /api/auth/mobile/signout` — Sign out mobile client
- `GET /api/auth/me` — Get current user
- `PATCH /api/auth/me` — Update user profile
- `DELETE /api/auth/me` — Delete account

### Catalog

- `POST /api/catalog/preview/` — Preview program definition
- `GET /api/catalog/` — List program definitions
- `GET /api/catalog/{programId}` — Get program definition

### Exercises

- `GET /api/exercises` — List exercises
- `POST /api/exercises` — Create exercise
- `GET /api/muscle-groups` — List muscle groups

### Insights

- `GET /api/insights/` — List user insights

### Other

- `GET /api/internal/cleanup-tokens`
- `POST /api/internal/cleanup-tokens`
- `GET /api/internal/purge-users`
- `POST /api/internal/purge-users`
- `GET /api/internal/analytics/compute`
- `POST /api/internal/analytics/compute`
- `GET /api/internal/maintenance`
- `POST /api/internal/maintenance`

### Programs

- `GET /api/programs/` — List program instances
- `POST /api/programs/` — Create a program instance
- `GET /api/programs/{id}` — Get program instance
- `PATCH /api/programs/{id}` — Update program instance
- `DELETE /api/programs/{id}` — Delete program instance
- `PATCH /api/programs/{id}/metadata` — Update program metadata
- `GET /api/programs/{id}/export` — Export program instance
- `POST /api/programs/import` — Import program instance

### Results

- `POST /api/programs/{id}/results` — Record a workout result
- `DELETE /api/programs/{id}/results/{workoutIndex}/{slotId}` — Delete a workout result
- `POST /api/programs/{id}/undo` — Undo last result action

### Stats

- `GET /api/stats/online` — Online users count

### System

- `GET /api/health` — Health check
<!-- AUTO:API-END -->

## Auto-generated: Database schema

<!-- AUTO:DB-START -->

_13 tables. Source: `packages/database/src/schema.ts`._

### `email_verification_tokens`

`id` _(uuid, PK)_ · `user_id` _(uuid, NOT NULL)_ · `token_hash` _(varchar, unique, NOT NULL)_ · `expires_at` _(timestamp, NOT NULL)_ · `created_at` _(timestamp, NOT NULL)_

### `exercises`

`id` _(varchar, PK)_ · `name` _(varchar, NOT NULL)_ · `muscle_group_id` _(varchar, NOT NULL)_ · `equipment` _(varchar)_ · `is_compound` _(boolean, NOT NULL)_ · `is_system` _(boolean, NOT NULL)_ · `created_by_user_id` _(uuid)_ · `created_at` _(timestamp, NOT NULL)_ · `force_type` _(varchar)_ · `level` _(varchar)_ · `movement_mechanic` _(varchar)_ · `category` _(varchar)_ · `secondary_muscles` _(array)_

### `muscle_groups`

`id` _(varchar, PK)_ · `name` _(varchar, NOT NULL)_ · `created_at` _(timestamp, NOT NULL)_

### `password_reset_tokens`

`id` _(uuid, PK)_ · `user_id` _(uuid, NOT NULL)_ · `token_hash` _(varchar, unique, NOT NULL)_ · `expires_at` _(timestamp, NOT NULL)_ · `created_at` _(timestamp, NOT NULL)_

### `program_definitions`

`id` _(uuid, PK)_ · `user_id` _(uuid, NOT NULL)_ · `definition` _(jsonb, NOT NULL)_ · `status` _(enum, NOT NULL)_ · `deleted_at` _(timestamp)_ · `created_at` _(timestamp, NOT NULL)_ · `updated_at` _(timestamp, NOT NULL)_

### `program_instances`

`id` _(uuid, PK)_ · `user_id` _(uuid, NOT NULL)_ · `template_id` _(varchar, NOT NULL)_ · `definition_id` _(uuid)_ · `custom_definition` _(jsonb)_ · `name` _(varchar, NOT NULL)_ · `program_config` _(jsonb, NOT NULL)_ · `metadata` _(jsonb)_ · `status` _(enum, NOT NULL)_ · `created_at` _(timestamp, NOT NULL)_ · `updated_at` _(timestamp, NOT NULL)_

### `program_templates`

`id` _(varchar, PK)_ · `name` _(varchar, NOT NULL)_ · `description` _(text, NOT NULL)_ · `author` _(varchar, NOT NULL)_ · `version` _(smallint, NOT NULL)_ · `category` _(varchar, NOT NULL)_ · `level` _(varchar, NOT NULL)_ · `source` _(varchar, NOT NULL)_ · `definition` _(jsonb, NOT NULL)_ · `is_active` _(boolean, NOT NULL)_ · `created_at` _(timestamp, NOT NULL)_ · `updated_at` _(timestamp, NOT NULL)_

### `refresh_tokens`

`id` _(uuid, PK)_ · `user_id` _(uuid, NOT NULL)_ · `token_hash` _(varchar, unique, NOT NULL)_ · `previous_token_hash` _(varchar)_ · `expires_at` _(timestamp, NOT NULL)_ · `created_at` _(timestamp, NOT NULL)_

### `undo_entries`

`id` _(bigserial, PK)_ · `instance_id` _(uuid, NOT NULL)_ · `workout_index` _(smallint, NOT NULL)_ · `slot_id` _(varchar, NOT NULL)_ · `previous_result` _(enum)_ · `previous_amrap_reps` _(smallint)_ · `previous_rpe` _(smallint)_ · `previous_set_logs` _(jsonb)_ · `created_at` _(timestamp, NOT NULL)_

### `user_identities`

`id` _(uuid, PK)_ · `user_id` _(uuid, NOT NULL)_ · `provider` _(varchar, NOT NULL)_ · `provider_account_id` _(varchar, NOT NULL)_ · `created_at` _(timestamp, NOT NULL)_

### `user_insights`

`id` _(bigserial, PK)_ · `user_id` _(uuid, NOT NULL)_ · `insight_type` _(varchar, NOT NULL)_ · `exercise_id` _(varchar)_ · `payload` _(jsonb, NOT NULL)_ · `computed_at` _(timestamp, NOT NULL)_ · `valid_until` _(timestamp)_

### `users`

`id` _(uuid, PK)_ · `email` _(varchar, unique, NOT NULL)_ · `google_id` _(varchar, unique)_ · `password_hash` _(text)_ · `email_verified` _(boolean, NOT NULL)_ · `name` _(varchar)_ · `avatar_url` _(text)_ · `deleted_at` _(timestamp)_ · `created_at` _(timestamp, NOT NULL)_ · `updated_at` _(timestamp, NOT NULL)_

### `workout_results`

`id` _(bigserial, PK)_ · `instance_id` _(uuid, NOT NULL)_ · `workout_index` _(smallint, NOT NULL)_ · `slot_id` _(varchar, NOT NULL)_ · `result` _(enum, NOT NULL)_ · `amrap_reps` _(smallint)_ · `rpe` _(smallint)_ · `set_logs` _(jsonb)_ · `completed_at` _(timestamp)_ · `created_at` _(timestamp, NOT NULL)_ · `updated_at` _(timestamp, NOT NULL)_
